events.title: Catman Meet & Greet + BBQ
events.location: The Village Green, Kensington NSW, Australia
events.description:
Kai: YOOOO DID YOU HEAR, CATMAN IS GONNA BE AT NSA BBQ ON MONDAY!!!

Shogo: who’s Catman…?

Kai: The Japanese Superhero!! He’s been walking from the west end of Australia all the way to Sydney for 2 years, crazy right??!!

Shogo: Woah that’s so cool, I really want to meet him!!

Whether you want to meet Catman, get a free lunch or simply want to meet new people, make sure you come down to NSA’s BBQ‼️🍖🍗

🗓️ Location: 16th of March (Monday)
⏰ Time: 11:00am - 1:00pm
📍 Location: UNSW Village Green
💵 Price: Free for NSA Members
               $2 for Non-Members.

events.title: Language Exchange Night
events.description: Practice Japanese with native speakers and make new friends from Japan. All levels welcome — bring your textbook or just your curiosity.

events.title: Ramen & Anime Night
events.description: Bowl in hand, screen on. We're watching classic Studio Ghibli titles alongside a ramen cook-along. Cosy, cultural, and delicious.

events.title: Japan Trip Planning Session
events.description: Heading to Japan? Join our travel planning meetup and pick up our free Japan travel guide, packed with insider tips.

collaborations.desc: Joint cultural evenings bringing together East Asian communities — K-pop meets J-pop in unforgettable socials.
Co-hosting anime screenings, cosplay nights, and conventions where fandoms collide.
Cultural education partner providing resources, guest speakers, and support for our Japanese language initiatives.
Supporting international students from Japan transitioning into life at UNSW through our liaison program.
Partnering with Sydney's Japanese restaurant and business community for authentic cultural and culinary events.
One of the biggest highlights - Highschool tours at UNSW run by NSA
Academic partnerships supporting Japanese language learners with workshops and tutoring connections.
